    base:desc "Sensor measuring the linear velocity of the carriage, feeding instantaneous velocity data."

]

    base:desc "Sensor monitoring the status of the CNC/PLC actuator, reporting on enabled/disabled state."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ActuatorStatusTelemetry

instance PositionTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance VelocityTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocitySensor
]

instance ActuatorStatusTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ActuatorStatusSensor
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped position measurement stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingDataIngestionEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped velocity measurement stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingDataIngestionEnabler
]

instance ActuatorStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped actuator status stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ActuatorStatusTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingDataIngestionEnabler
]

instance PositionInfluxData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position measurement forwarded to InfluxDB for continuous validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDataStorageEnabler
]

instance VelocityInfluxData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity measurement forwarded to InfluxDB for continuous validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDataStorageEnabler
]

instance ActuatorStatusInfluxData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actuator status forwarded to InfluxDB for continuous validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ActuatorStatusTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDataStorageEnabler
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Collects and archives raw sensor telemetry and actuator data in a persistent database for post‑hoc analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAvailableInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Samples recorded sensor data from InfluxDB, compares it against the kinematic simulation, and alerts operators if the Euclidean distance exceeds a threshold."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationResultInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides SendAlertAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays real‑time and historical trajectories in interactive 3D and 2D dashboards using Grafana."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeTrajectoryAction
]

instance ModelBasedOptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs the kinematic simulation model in a virtual environment and computes optimal control commands before deploying them to the physical crane."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputeOptimalControlAction
]

instance LoggingDataIngestionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python based ingestion component that forwards raw state telemetry to a TimescaleDB database."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance InfluxDataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stores continuous sensor streams in InfluxDB for fast querying during validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance SimulationRunnerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes the kinematic simulation model to generate predicted state trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelBasedOptimalControlService
]

instance VisualizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bridges the stored data to Grafana dashboards for interactive visual inspection."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs the control synthesis algorithm and interfaces with the SimulationRunner to test optimal commands."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelBasedOptimalControlService
]

instance KinematicSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed CAD‑based kinematic representation of the gantry crane, used for simulation of state trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationRunnerEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D rendering model of the gantry crane trajectories for real‑time visualization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizerEnabler
]

instance HistoricalDataAvailableInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates availability of archived sensor data for analysis."
]

instance ValidationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Euclidean distance between real‑time sensor readings and simulated states, used to assess twin fidelity."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time rendering of measured and simulated trajectories."
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation of optimal control actions computed by the virtual environment."
]

    base:desc "Sends an alert to the operator via the Grafana dashboard when validation thresholds are exceeded."

]

instance VisualizeTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [

]

]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "All components of the gantry crane digital twin are orchestrated within a Docker‑based C4 architecture. The system comprises a TimescaleDB container for timestamped data storage, an Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker container for publish/subscribe telemetry exchange, and several functional containers (e.g., control, simulation, dashboard). Communication between the physical crane and the twin occurs through MQTT topics with QoS 1, and the database is queried via SQL over a REST API. Management of container lifecycle and resource allocation is handled by Docker Compose, enabling isolated but interconnected services on a single container host."
]
